'''chathata''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:roadful|roadful]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-th-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roadful|roadful]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| chathata
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæthætæth|chæthætæth]] || [[word:chæthætæj|chæthætæj]] || [[word:chæthætæsh|chæthætæsh]] || [[word:chæthætæ|chæthætæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chathathatath|chathathatath]] || [[word:chathathataj|chathathataj]] || [[word:chathathatash|chathathatash]] || [[word:chathathata|chathathata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chathatath|chathatath]] || [[word:chathataj|chathataj]] || [[word:chathatash|chathatash]] || [[word:chathata|chathata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chathaftath|chathaftath]] || [[word:chathaftaj|chathaftaj]] || [[word:chathaftash|chathaftash]] || [[word:chathaftaf|chathaftaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chathatatha|chathatatha]] || [[word:chathataja|chathataja]] || [[word:chathatasha|chathatasha]] || [[word:chathataka|chathataka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chathatath|chathatath]] || [[word:chathataj|chathataj]] || [[word:chathatash|chathatash]] || [[word:chathata|chathata]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chathatathal|chathatathal]] || [[word:chathatajal|chathatajal]] || [[word:chathatashal|chathatashal]] || [[word:chathatakal|chathatakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chathatathatha|chathatathatha]] || [[word:chathatajaja|chathatajaja]] || [[word:chathatashasha|chathatashasha]] || [[word:chathataka|chathataka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chathatathan|chathatathan]] || [[word:chathatajan|chathatajan]] || [[word:chathatashan|chathatashan]] || [[word:chathatakan|chathatakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chathatathaoro|chathatathaoro]] || [[word:chathatajaoro|chathatajaoro]] || [[word:chathatashaoro|chathatashaoro]] || [[word:chathatakaoro|chathatakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
